mapper.select: select id, redeem_request_id, user_id, item_id, status, cost_balance_snapshot, fulfillment_mode_snapshot, item_name_snapshot, item_desc_snapshot, create_time, update_time from reward_order where id = #{id}

select id, redeem_request_id, user_id, item_id, status, cost_balance_snapshot, fulfillment_mode_snapshot, item_name_snapshot, item_desc_snapshot, create_time, update_time from reward_order where id = #{id} for update

select id, redeem_request_id, user_id, item_id, status, cost_balance_snapshot, fulfillment_mode_snapshot, item_name_snapshot, item_desc_snapshot, create_time, update_time from reward_order where user_id = #{userId} order by id desc

select id, redeem_request_id, user_id, item_id, status, cost_balance_snapshot, fulfillment_mode_snapshot, item_name_snapshot, item_desc_snapshot, create_time, update_time from reward_order order by id desc
mapper.insert: insert into reward_order( redeem_request_id, user_id, item_id, status, cost_balance_snapshot, fulfillment_mode_snapshot, item_name_snapshot, item_desc_snapshot ) values ( #{redeemRequestId}, #{userId}, #{itemId}, #{status}, #{costBalanceSnapshot}, #{fulfillmentModeSnapshot}, #{itemNameSnapshot}, #{itemDescSnapshot} )
